mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus ( store_id, menu_name, menu_price, menu_cost, packaging_fee, expected_cooking_time, batch_capacity ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{menuName}, #{menuPrice}, #{menuCost}, #{packagingFee}, #{expectedCookingTime}, #{batchCapacity} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, store_id, menu_name, menu_price, menu_cost, packaging_fee, expected_cooking_time, batch_capacity, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM menus
WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT oi.menu_id AS menu_id, o.platform_type AS platform_type, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS sales_quantity
FROM order_items oi
INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
INNER JOIN menus m ON m.id = oi.menu_id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND m.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.order_status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY oi.menu_id, o.platform_type

SELECT id, store_id, menu_id, dismissed_at, hide_until, restored_at, created_at, updated_at
FROM menu_loss_dismissals
WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND restored_at IS NULL AND hide_until > NOW()
ORDER BY hide_until ASC, id DESC

SELECT id, store_id, menu_id, dismissed_at, hide_until, restored_at, created_at, updated_at
FROM menu_loss_dismissals
WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND menu_id = #{menuId} AND restored_at IS NULL AND hide_until > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_loss_dismissals ( store_id, menu_id, dismissed_at, hide_until, restored_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{menuId}, NOW(), #{hideUntil}, NULL, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dismissed_at = NOW(), hide_until = VALUES(hide_until), restored_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT id, store_id, menu_name, menu_price, menu_cost, packaging_fee, expected_cooking_time, batch_capacity, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM menus
WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE menus
menu_name = #{menuName},
menu_price = #{menuPrice},
menu_cost = #{menuCost},
packaging_fee = #{packagingFee},
expected_cooking_time = #{expectedCookingTime},
batch_capacity = #{batchCapacity},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
